description: A detailed painting of a European town square dominated by a large Gothic church with a tall stone tower on the left side. The church features pointed arch windows with tracery and buttresses. In the square, numerous townspeople go about their daily activities — women carrying baskets, men in conversation, a horse standing near buildings. Market stalls or shops appear at the base of the church. On the right side, the street extends into the distance with rows of traditional Dutch or Flemish buildings. The sky is blue with billowing white clouds.

_meta.title: Town Square Before A Church A Capriccio
